title: SQLancer inputs not the same size
poc: create view v0(c0) as (select distinct 0.4 from t0 where ((t0.c0)and((((lower(t0.c1))||(((((-69891801)/(1210439951)))+(cast(0.5895729273161221 as int)))))) between symmetric (cast(0.3 as string)) and (greatest(t0.c1, ((t0.c1)||(-2045486895)))))));
key_bug_features: Mismatched input sizes in SQLancer queries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), age INT CHECK (age >= 0));
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT id, name FROM t1 WHERE age IS NOT NULL;
SELECT v1.name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1 WHERE age < 0) AS negative_age_count FROM v1;
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE name LIKE '%' || NULL || '%';
